name: Pacific Spaceport Complex Alaska

overview.value: The Pacific Spaceport Complex – Alaska (PSCA), formerly the Kodiak Launch Complex, is a dual-use commercial and military spaceport for sub-orbital and orbital launch vehicles located on Kodiak Island, Alaska. It is owned and operated by the Alaska Aerospace Corporation, a corporation owned by the government of Alaska. The spaceport opened in 1998 and has supported 34 launches (up to January 2026), most of those for the U.S. government.

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.

events.headline: Alaska Aerospace Development Corporation established to build Kodiak launch site
Alaska Aerospace begins launch services from Kodiak Island site
Kodiak Launch Complex damaged after hypersonic weapon test terminated for safety (per SpaceNews)
